debug_info.goal:
α : Type
inst✝ : LinearOrder α
pivot : α
l : List α
x : α
⊢ List.count x l = List.count x (smaller α inst✝ pivot l) + List.count x (larger α inst✝ pivot l)

failed_attempts:
induction l with
  | nil => simp
  | cons y ys ih =>
    simp [ih]
    split <;> simp_all

induction l with
  | nil => simp
  | cons y ys ih =>
    simp
    split_ifs <;> simp_all

induction l with
  | nil => simp
  | cons y ys ih =>
    simp [ih]
    split_ifs <;> simp_all <;> linarith

induction l with
  | nil => simp
  | cons y ys ih =>
    simp [ih]
    split_ifs <;> simp_all

induction l with
  | nil => simp
  | cons a l ih => by_cases a ≤ pivot <;> simp_all

induction l with
  | nil => simp
  | cons y l ih =>
    simp [ih]
    split_ifs <;> simp_all

induction l with
  | nil => simp
  | cons y l ih =>
    simp [ih]
    split_ifs <;> simp_all

induction l with
  | nil => simp
  | cons y ys ih =>
    simp [ih]
    split_ifs <;> omega

induction l with
  | nil => simp
  | cons hd tl ih =>
    simp [ih]
    split_ifs <;> grind

induction l with
  | nil => simp
  | cons y ys ih =>
    simp [ih]
    by_cases h : y ≤ pivot
    · simp [h, not_lt_of_le h]
    · simp [h, lt_of_not_le h]
      ac_rfl

induction l with
  | nil => simp
  | cons y ys ih =>
    simp [smaller, larger, ih]
    split_ifs <;> grind

rw [smaller, larger, List.count_filter, List.count_filter]
  split_ifs <;> simp_all

induction l with
  | nil => simp
  | cons y l ih =>
    simp [ih]
    split_ifs <;> simp_all <;> ac_rfl
